questions.question: AI scribe estimated: client is stably housed (61% confidence). Please confirm or correct.
options: client is unhoused and sleeping outside
client is unhoused and sleeping in a vehicle
client is couch surfing or in unstable temporary housing
questions.clinical_context: Determines which housing resources are surfaced
questions.evidence: Yeah so what I really need right now is housing

questions.question: Client indicated they see a provider but did not name one. Do they have an established primary care provider?
questions.clinical_context: Determines whether PCP connection task is added

housing.evidence: Yeah so what I really need right now is housing
